title: PhonePe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: PhonePe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
